resources.string:
Hey, this is Oleg, the author.

Many thanks for checking out Press-Cut. If you like it, please support my work\u00A0❤️

To leave a suggestion or report a bug, visit the project\'s GitHub page.

Press-Cut is inspired by OneStamp for iOS, made by Weiqing Chu. The app uses many open-source libraries and icons from Noun Project.
